sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81058" key="peria/lghma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιάλγ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n81058.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">severe pain</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:119(109)" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.119(109)</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
